notes: Trent 700 entered service mid-1990s; mature/legacy lifecycle.
Trent 900 entered service with A380; mature low-growth lifecycle.
Trent 1000 entered service with 787 family; mature lifecycle with active fleet.
Trent 7000 entered service with A330neo; growth-phase fleet.
Trent XWB entered service with A350 family; growth-phase flagship fleet.
